Text_interviewer_participant: Okay Little girl was outside playing and her cat went up the tree She was very distressed at the thought that her cat was up the tree and was trying to encourage it to come down as was her dog who was barking as well But part of the issue was that dad was trying to help get the cat down and he got stuck up there himself He wasnt very comfortable being up the tree So the dog was barking at the dad and was trying to help get the cat down So somebody had called the fireman so that they could come and help And it appeared as though the firemen were rushing with their ladders in to try to help get dad down and also get the cat down because the fathers ladder that he had used to get up had fallen off the tree And so the father had no way of getting down as well
translated: Okay Little girl was outside playing and her cat went up the tree She was very distressed at the thought that her cat was up the tree and was trying to encourage it to come down as was her dog who was barking as well But part of the issue was that dad was trying to help get the cat down and he got stuck up there himself He wasnt very comfortable being up the tree So the dog was barking at the dad and was trying to help get the cat down So somebody had called the fireman so that they could come and help And it appeared as though the firemen were rushing with their ladders in to try to help get dad down and also get the cat down because the fathers ladder that he had used to get up had fallen off the tree And so the father had no way of getting down as well
